_comment: OEM lookup table for human-readable descriptions of OpenTherm values.
_format: Keys follow the pattern CATEGORY.CODE where CODE is a decimal integer 0-255.
_categories: OEMFaultCode (register 5 LB), TSP (register 11 HB index), FHB (register 13 HB index), OEMDiagCode (register 73/115), OEMFaultCodeVH (register 72 LB)
_usage: Upload this file to the OTGW device via the file explorer. Descriptions appear as extra MQTT topics.
_example_brand: Remeha Calenta / Avanta (replace or extend with values from your boiler manual)
OEMFaultCode.1: E:01 Loss of communication with a slave
OEMFaultCode.4: E:04 Lock: Sensor error flow temperature
OEMFaultCode.5: E:05 Lock: Sensor error return temperature
OEMFaultCode.6: E:06 Lock: Sensor error DHW temperature
OEMFaultCode.7: E:07 Lock: Sensor error flue gas
OEMFaultCode.8: E:08 Lock: Sensor error outside temperature
OEMFaultCode.9: E:09 Lock: Sensor error room temperature
OEMFaultCode.11: E:11 Lock: No ionisation after 5 ignition attempts
OEMFaultCode.13: E:13 Lock: Anti-freeze active, no flow
OEMFaultCode.14: E:14 Lock: Flow temperature too high
OEMFaultCode.15: E:15 Lock: Return temperature too high
OEMFaultCode.16: E:16 Lock: Temperature difference flow/return too high
OEMFaultCode.17: E:17 Lock: Flue gas temperature too high
OEMFaultCode.18: E:18 Lock: Safety temperature limiter (STB) activated
OEMFaultCode.19: E:19 Lock: Water pressure too low
OEMFaultCode.20: E:20 Lock: Water pressure too high
OEMFaultCode.24: E:24 Lock: Air supply error (air pressure switch)
